name: isolation-evidence-no-ledger-silent
description: A clean medium record with NO delegation ledger at all (no delegations key -> no .quality-loop/delegations.jsonl). The isolation check is opt-in and gated behind ledger presence, so a ledger-less repo is completely unaffected: no self-attested advisory, no finding, ships exit 0. This pins the ledger-less path the enforcement matrix promises.

record.goal: Ship a multi-feature library (tokenizer, parser, ranker, serializer) behind one query entry point
acceptance_criteria: Query returns ranked snippets across all feature paths

minimality_decision.reason: new library; fan out per feature module

findings_exclude: does not ground the review as isolated
